title: Mechelen、Antwerp — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Mechelen、Antwerpの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

MechelenはAntwerpにある人口86,000の都市です。A centrally located city with a magnificent Gothic cathedral, lively market square, and excellent rail connections to Brussels and Antwerp.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
